sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68484" key="monimo/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονῐμότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n68484.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">constancy, steadfastness</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg007:p.60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Alc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.60</biblScope> </bibl> C.</sense> </entryFree>
